entries.title: v1.4.0: The Backup & Sync Update Is Here!
entries.text: Introducing the Modula Smart Optimizer! We've also added a Performance Monitor, Discord Rich Presence fixes, and automated JVM tuning. Upgrade now for the smoothest Minecraft experience.

entries.title: Welcome to Modula MC Launcher!
entries.text: Modula Launcher is officially out! Experience lightning fast modpack installations, a seamless golden waves UI, and our custom seamless migration tools.
